title: Glide 1.8.0 is here 🌍
body:
🌍 Global Leaderboard — You have the option to submit your scores and see how you rank against Glide drivers around the world.

🎯 Fairer scoring — your Smooth Turns score now reflects how you actually take corners, not how long your drive was. Your past trips update automatically.

📱 Better background recording — drives are now captured reliably even with the screen off or your phone in your pocket.
